SELECT "t0"."Id", "t0"."AssigneeId", "t0"."CreatedAt", "t0"."Description", "t0"."DueDate", "t0"."IsStarred", "t0"."IsSynced", "t0"."LastModifiedBy", "t0"."Priority", "t0"."ProjectId", "t0"."Status", "t0"."SyncId", "t0"."Title", "t0"."UpdatedAt", "a"."Id", "a"."AvatarUrl", "a"."Company", "a"."Country", "a"."CreatedAt", "a"."Email", "a"."FirstName", "a"."FullName", "a"."LastLoginAt", "a"."LastName", "a"."PasswordHash", "a"."Phone", "a"."ResetToken", "a"."ResetTokenExpiry", "a"."Timezone"
FROM (
    SELECT "t"."Id", "t"."AssigneeId", "t"."CreatedAt", "t"."Description", "t"."DueDate", "t"."IsStarred", "t"."IsSynced", "t"."LastModifiedBy", "t"."Priority", "t"."ProjectId", "t"."Status", "t"."SyncId", "t"."Title", "t"."UpdatedAt"
    FROM "TaskItems" AS "t"
    WHERE "t"."AssigneeId" = @userId
    ORDER BY "t"."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS "t0"
